message:
fix(analytics): remove duplicate visit count incrementing

The trackSessionStart() function in analytics.ts already handles visit
counting and sets user properties. The analytics-provider.tsx was also
incrementing the count and setting the same properties, causing visits
to be double-counted.

Removed the duplicate code - trackSessionStart() now handles all visit
tracking logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
